name: git-review
description: AI-powered git code review — review uncommitted changes, branch diffs, specific commits, and generate commit messages
author: Oboto
trait: Use review_uncommitted to review unstaged/staged git changes before committing. Use review_branch to compare the current branch against main/master/develop. Use review_commit to review a specific commit by hash. Use git_diff to get a raw unified diff. Use generate_commit_message to create conventional commit messages for staged changes. These tools help with code quality, catching bugs, and maintaining clean git history.
